_meta.description: File role classification — maps every key file to its responsibility

pages.src/app/dashboard/page.tsx: Setup wizard (3 phases): repo config -> tech selection -> question count + candidate info
pages.src/app/interview/page.tsx: Interview conductor: starter/behavioral + technical questions with voice input
pages.src/app/review/page.tsx: Score review: validate/override LLM scores, edit assessments
pages.src/app/trainer/page.tsx: Trainer dashboard — roster view with readiness badges
pages.src/app/trainer/[slug]/page.tsx: Associate detail — session history, gap trend charts, calibration
pages.src/app/associate/[slug]/page.tsx: Public associate profile — session history + readiness status

components.src/components/SpeechToText.tsx: Web Speech API voice input component
components.src/components/trainer/RosterTable.tsx: Sortable roster table on trainer dashboard
components.src/components/trainer/EmptyGapState.tsx: Empty state for no gap data
components.src/components/trainer/SessionHistoryLis: Session history list on associate detail
components.src/components/trainer/SkillFilterDropdo: Skill filter for gap trend chart
components.src/components/trainer/GapTrendChart.tsx: Recharts line chart for gap score trends
components.src/components/trainer/CalibrationView.t: Score calibration view on associate detail

lib_services.src/lib/prisma.ts: Singleton Prisma client with pg pool adapter for Supabase
lib_services.src/lib/sessionPersistence.ts: Dual-write orchestrator — upserts Associate + writes Session to Supabase
lib_services.src/lib/gapService.ts: Pure-function gap scoring (0.8 decay, recency-weighted averages)
lib_services.src/lib/gapPersistence.ts: Persists gap scores to DB, reads gap scores with 3-session gate
lib_services.src/lib/settingsService.ts: Read/write trainer settings, triggers bulk readiness recompute on change
lib_services.src/lib/adaptiveSetup.ts: Maps gap scores to tech weights (1-5) for setup wizard pre-population
lib_services.src/lib/langchain.ts: LangGraph scoring workflow with conditional routing (starter vs technical vs public)
lib_services.src/lib/markdownParser.ts: Parses question markdown into structured data, weighted random selection
lib_services.src/lib/github-service.ts: GitHub API client for fetching question bank content
lib_services.src/lib/rateLimitService.ts: Per-user rate limiting via fingerprinting (2/13hr session, 125/day)
lib_services.src/lib/cleanupService.ts: Scheduled cleanup for history (72hr) and rate limits (24hr)
lib_services.src/lib/auth-server.ts: Server-side auth check via HttpOnly cookie
lib_services.src/lib/email-templates.ts: HTML email template for PDF report delivery
lib_services.src/lib/types.ts: Core TypeScript types (InterviewSession, ParsedQuestion, QuestionAssessment, etc.)

store.src/store/interviewStore.ts: Central Zustand store — interview session, setup wizard, assessments, navigation

config.next.config.ts: Next.js config — standalone output, Prisma tracing, transpile react-pdf
config.prisma/schema.prisma: Database schema — Associate, Session, GapScore, Settings, HealthCheck
config.Dockerfile: Multi-stage Docker build (deps -> builder -> runner) on node:22-alpine

data_layer.data/rate-limits.json: Rate limit state per fingerprint (24hr cleanup)
